name: Taxonomy Architecture Analyzer
description: Open-source, AI-assisted enterprise architecture and knowledge graph platform for deriving, analysing and versioning architecture models from requirements, regulations, documents and architecture taxonomies. It combines hierarchical LLM-assisted scoring, explainable architecture mapping, relation discovery, source provenance, a Git-backed architecture DSL, and exports to formats such as ArchiMate, Visio, Mermaid, JSON, Markdown, HTML and DOCX.
applicationCategory: Enterprise Architecture, Architecture Analysis, Decision Support
softwareRequirements: Optional LLM API key or LOCAL_ONNX provider
